one_time_description: Loss on business combination - dissolution and absorption of 5343 NWT Ltd. effective April 1, 2019
economic_notes: First Nation operates in Hamlet of Fort Providence, NT. Digaa Enterprises Ltd. provides construction services and commercial/residential property rental. Evergreen Forestry Limited Partnership provides forest fire fighting and forestry services near Hay River, NT under a fire suppression contract with GNWT. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 2020 with anticipated impacts on operations.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) fundraising revenues not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification; (2) Digaa Enterprises Ltd. (70% subsidiary) financial statements are reviewed not audited. Province set to NT (Northwest Territories). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated - listed only as Chartered Professional Accountants from Yellowknife. 5343 NWT Ltd. was involuntarily dissolved and absorbed via business combination effective April 1, 2019 resulting in $105,227 loss. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries (Undah Gogha Corporation 100%, Fort Providence Resource Management Board 100%). Two GBEs on modified equity basis (Digaa Enterprises Ltd. 70%, Evergreen Forestry Limited Partnership 50%). OSR calculated as total revenue $1,756,846 minus total government transfers $1,641,994 = $114,852. Prior year accumulated surplus is beginning of 2020 year = $421,952. Budget information not reported as it is not available.
